query:
UPDATE ohlc_candles
                SET gap = true
                WHERE time IN (
                    SELECT c_stable.time
                    FROM ohlc_candles c_stable
                    INNER JOIN LATERAL (
                        SELECT stable
                        FROM ohlc_candles
                        WHERE time < c_stable.time
                        ORDER BY time DESC
                        LIMIT 1
                    ) c_prev ON true
                    WHERE c_stable.time >= $1
                    AND c_stable.stable = true
                    AND c_stable.gap = false
                    AND c_prev.stable = false
                )
